Name: FeFreeDialogParam
Description: Determines the display parameters to use for interface dialogue elements.

Fields.Name: Dialogue Group
Fields.Description: The dialogue control group this element belongs to.

Fields.Name: Display Time
Fields.Description: The time to display this element. 0 means unlimited. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Base Position: Left
Fields.Description: The x-coordinate of the base element position. Left (0) to Right (100).

Fields.Name: Base Position: Top
Fields.Description: The y-coordinate of the base element position. Top (0) to Bottom (100).

Fields.Name: Base Width
Fields.Description: The base width of the element. None (0) to Entire Screen (100).

Fields.Name: Base Height
Fields.Description: The base height of the element. None (0) to Entire Screen (100).

Fields.Name: Base Color: R
Fields.Description: The red component for the RGBA color for the element.

Fields.Name: Base Color: G
Fields.Description: The green component for the RGBA color for the element.

Fields.Name: Base Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue component for the RGBA color for the element.

Fields.Name: Base Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component for the RGBA color for the element. Transparent (0) to Opaque (255)

Fields.Name: Font Color: R
Fields.Description: The red component for the RGBA color for the text used in the element.

Fields.Name: Font Color: G
Fields.Description: The green component for the RGBA color for the text used in the element.

Fields.Name: Font Color: B
Fields.Description: The blue component for the RGBA color for the text used in the element.

Fields.Name: Font Color: Alpha
Fields.Description: The alpha component for the RGBA color for the text used in the element. Transparent (0) to Opaque (255)

Fields.Name: Font Size
Fields.Description: The magnification to apply to the font display size.
